subject: Re: (no subject)
body:
Dear Jeffrey,

I will be back in the States on Saturday night, I would love to see you if you are in N.Y. I will call you Saturday evening. J.P.

i am in new york ... I expect a call.. please don't ignore  me or your 
reponsibilites.. J>P> I have been patient.. ,
